issues.description: ARMCD values should match controlled terminology; verify Pbo/Xan_Lo/Xan_Hi against CDISC submission value level
USUBJID concatenation format should be validated against XX-XXX-XXXX pattern per SDTM spec
Screen failure subjects (ARMCD='Scrnfail') are retained in DM but excluded from ADaM ADSL; this is expected per SDTM standard
